summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Events page, Leads page (no mock data), UserProfile Documents tab, and sidebar navigation changes. All 17 backend tests passed. All UI flows working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data for events and leads created during testing, then cleaned up. Documents uploaded during API tests still exist in user profile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 are working. Events page has full CRUD with calendar/list views. Leads page connected to backend with no mock data. UserProfile has Documents tab with upload functionality.
